zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Robert Goodloe於1514年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿斯普爾時，他的父親Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf37歲，母親Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish34歲。他於1535年與Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard在英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿斯普爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1597年6月23日在英國藍卡爾阿斯普爾享年83歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾阿斯普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Robert Goodloe于1514年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾阿斯普爾时，他的父亲Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf37岁，母亲Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish34岁。他于1535年与Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard在英国英格兰藍卡爾阿斯普爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1597年6月23日在英国藍卡爾阿斯普爾享年83岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾阿斯普爾。

nameMeanings.name: Goodloe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Robert Goodloe was born in 1514, in Aspull, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf, was 37 and his mother, Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish, was 34. He married Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard in 1535, in Aspull, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 23 June 1597, in Aspull, Lancashire, England, at the age of 83, and was buried in Aspull, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Robert Goodloe est né en 1514, à Aspull, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard en 1535, à Aspull, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 23 juin 1597, à Aspull, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à Aspull, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Robert Goodloe 1514 in Aspull, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf 37 und seine Mutter Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish 34. Er hat 1535 in Aspull, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Juni 1597 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Aspull, Lancashire, England und wurde in Aspull, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Robert Goodloe è nato il nel 1514 nel Aspull, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard nel 1535, nel Aspull, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 giugno 1597, nel Aspull, Lancashire, England, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolto a Aspull, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Robert Goodloeが1514年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアアスプウルで生まれた時，父Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggfは37歳，母Lady Anne Elizabeth Standishは34歳であった。1535年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアアスプウルでLady Anna Elizabetha de Gerardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1597年6月23日にイギリスランカシュアイアアスプウルで83歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアアスプウルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Robert Goodloe(이)가 1514년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 아스풀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1535년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 아스풀에서 Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1597년 6월 23일 영국 랭카실르 아스풀에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 아스풀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Robert Goodloe nasceu em 1514, em Aspull, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard em 1535, em Aspull, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de junho de 1597, em Aspull, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em Aspull, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Robert Goodloe родился в 1514 г. в местности аспулл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph or Rauf Goodloe 13th ggf было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Elizabeth Standish, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anna Elizabetha de Gerard в 1535 г. в местности аспулл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 23 июня 1597 г. в местности аспулл, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности аспулл, ланкашир, Англия.

Murió el 23 de junio de 1597, en Aspull, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en Aspull, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
